title: pavonia gerleniae
intro: Pavonia gerleniae, also known as Rocky Mountain Pavonia, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia gerleniae include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
